songs.title: THE MAN
songs.lyrics:
In the hollow of the institution
Where the corridors breathe silence
He walks between the files
Footsteps echo through the archives

The man with paper skin
And eyes that catalog infinity
His fingers trace the margins
Of decisions that were never made

They built him from statistics
From the patterns of compliance
He knows the price of every gesture
The weight of unspoken words

In rooms without windows
Where the air tastes of copper and ozone
He compiles the data
Of a thousand surrenders

The man exists in the space
Between what is said and what remains
A monument to the architecture
Of acceptable loss

In the end
There is no end
Only the persistent hum
Of systems continuing
Without reason
Without remorse

songs.title: JOURNEY INWARD
songs.lyrics:
Walking through reality
We are more than what we can believe
The power gave us for our ancestres
For the conscience, for the existence

This power of the creation
Power gave us
Gave us to.fly away
Living inside our hearts
For tbe conscience, for the existence

Burning hearts!
Restless endless!
Native ways
As we own created it
Fly!

There's all that live in your own
Your only way!
As we own created it!
FLY, LIVE

There's no floor
There's no wall
There's no evil, no holiness
No time, no conditions

There's all that live in your own
Your only way
As we own created it!
Fly

Playing higher
Higher!!
High!!!!!

songs.title: KABAAL
songs.lyrics:
After cosmic fight
a thief self-called god
taking all the earth, taking all the control

feel his collective matrix
put a moon up in the sky
with the clones on the ground and the holograms, overtake control

kabaal let me talk about your conditions
see the world upon your knees and you need it play to feel

see the mass dominated, subdued and played, with graphene and radiation controlled their minds
dominated, subdueted domesticated amd played, the master of this world control their minds

Feel his collective matrix, power self created, we must fight our inmortal lives, before they thrash it all

songs.title: THRASH OF DOOM
songs.lyrics:
Thrash of Doom

Limitation of movement
Population mental control
Plan Scarcity of food
elimination of cash
No means of transportation for citizens
Workforce reduction
Tax increases

They incite a civil war,
for food and peace
they incite a civil war
until we self-destruct.

War without bombs 
 war without weapons, packaged food and vaccines will kill human beings

Nanobots  and radiations will take control
 of those who bear the mark of the beast

graphene is the code 
code of 666
Mass radio control
leads them to madness

Population reduction, scarcity, famine, 
plague and death

before our eyes an atmosphere who tinte our sky to black

time to elevate our sphere
is time for survive

Thrash of Doom
in the night
like a storm
who will survive


Intentional creation,
 they steal our energy
 the darks plan to consume our existence, 
our vital energy, 
grants us the source of life.
our vital energy
we must rise!!!!

Today's our consciousness is not  enough for evolution, there is still ambition, theft, and greed in the human mind.

A world without governments, 
without economy is still far from being 
as long as envy and hatred still exist in our hearts


The collective consciousness is not yet ready to evolve
 there is still ambition, theft, greed, and rage in our hearts
